Job Title: Data Analyst – Python & Cloud

We are looking for a Data Analyst with strong analytical and technical skills to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will have experience working with large datasets, building dashboards, and performing statistical analysis.

Responsibilities:

Analyze large datasets using Python and SQL

Build data pipelines and automate ETL processes

Develop dashboards using Power BI or Tableau

Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA)

Create data visualizations using Matplotlib or Seaborn

Work with cloud platforms such as Google Cloud Platform (GCP) or AWS

Collaborate with cross-functional teams

Optimize database queries for performance

Generate business insights and reports

Required Skills:

Python

Pandas

NumPy

SQL

Power BI or Tableau

Data Cleaning

Data Visualization

Statistical Analysis

Machine Learning basics

Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

REST APIs

Git

Preferred:

Experience with FastAPI

Knowledge of Docker

Experience deploying applications on Cloud Run

Understanding of NLP

Strong problem-solving skills
